Instruction: Walk straight out from under the concrete overhang, passing the blue sign on your right, and step onto the grass. Continue forward across the grassy area towards the large, light-colored building with numerous lit windows ahead of you. Navigate between the trees on the lawn as you approach the building. Step off the grass and onto the paved walkway that ramps slightly upwards towards the building's entrance. Stop once you reach the double glass doors at the entrance. You have arrived at your destination.
